findings.title: ADR-0006 frontmatter uses non-standard status value 'superseded by ADR-0011'
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md line 4 has `status: superseded by ADR-0011`. The MADR template (ADR-0008) and _template.md define `superseded` as the valid terminal status. The superseding relationship belongs in ADR-0011's `supersedes: '0006'` field, not in ADR-0006's status string. This non-standard value would break any future ADR index generator that parses frontmatter.
findings.fix_sketch: Change `status: superseded by ADR-0011` to `status: superseded`.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md status lifecycle description endorses non-standard 'superseded by NNNN' format
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md section 3 and section 4 describe the ADR status lifecycle as flipping to 'superseded by NNNN', perpetuating the non-standard format that ADR-0006 uses. The canonical valid value is just 'superseded' (per _template.md); the link to the superseding ADR is captured via the new ADR's `supersedes` field.
findings.fix_sketch: Change both instances of 'superseded by NNNN' to just 'superseded' in the How ADRs work here section.
